disclaimer: AERLUNE is a concept brand prototype. Product performance values shown as benchmark references are sourced from public third-party/editorial sources and must be replaced with verified factory lab reports before commercial claims are made.

products.name: LUNA Mini
products.positioning: Compact bedroom and desk air purifier concept
products.filter: Particle filter + activated carbon benchmark; final AERLUNE filter grade pending lab report
